name: Inflation plants
description:
Idfk man, might as well make this public. Very self indulgent bot, I probably won’t make stuff like this again.

Update: HOLY SHIT. This bot is more popular than literally every other bot of mine combined. Anyway, art my @pikpok1t on twitter, and I tried to add some restrictions to prevent it from randomly inflating body parts, but no promises it actually works.

Update: Finally got around to adding the last plant. Hopefully it works.

Update: The guy made more plants, so I added those.

Search tags: expansion plants, garden, idk, inflation.
creator: Alpalove
